entities.name: SEED GERMINATION

entities.description: The percentage of seeds that successfully germinate

entities.description: A measure of the speed and percentage of seed germination

entities.name: TOTAL SEEDLING LENGTH
entities.description: The combined length of the root and shoot of a seedling

entities.name: ROOT VIGOR INDEX
entities.description: An indicator of the strength and health of the root system

entities.name: SEEDLING DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seedling after water removal

entities.name: GERMINATION RATE
entities.description: The speed at which seeds germinate
